creator: sixday@sixday.hu
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #8)

Well, that's sad news.
I still believe git downgrade would work as the difference between git 2.11 and 2.10 isn't that big.
In the original gitlab bugreport many people confirmed that downgrade to 2.10 solves the problem.
I'll give it a try tonight if finally I'll be able to save the time to doing it.
